mmau-mini.best_instruction:
Listen to the audio and answer the multiple-choice question.
Given that a chainsaw is being run, identify the activity occurring in the background.
Options:
A. Construction
B. Lumberjacking
C. Carpentry
D. Farming
Answer with only the option letter and text, e.g. 'A. ...'.
